name: praja-dhvani-functions
description: Cloud Functions backend for Praja Dhvani: Aadhaar OCR extraction, Gemini classification/clustering/vision/audio-transcription, Cloud Translation. Requires the code-for-community-e2cf2 GCP project on the Blaze plan to deploy.

scripts.serve: npm run build && firebase emulators:start --only functions,firestore
